title: Meridian UK Equity Income Trust
content:
MERIDIAN UK EQUITY INCOME TRUST - PRODUCT FACTSHEET

OVERVIEW
The Meridian UK Equity Income Trust is an actively managed open-ended investment company (OEIC) focusing on dividend-paying UK equities. The fund targets a net yield of 4.5% per annum with capital growth potential over the medium to long term. As at the last review date, the fund manages £847 million in assets under management across 78 core holdings.

INVESTMENT OBJECTIVE
The Trust seeks to provide investors with an attractive level of income, primarily through investment in dividend-yielding UK equities, whilst maintaining the potential for capital appreciation. The fund typically maintains 85-95% exposure to UK-listed securities with market capitalisations exceeding £500 million. The remaining allocation may include REITs, preference shares, and up to 10% overseas developed market exposure through ADRs.

RISK PROFILE AND SUITABILITY
This product carries a moderate risk classification under our internal risk framework, corresponding to a volatility range of 12-18% annualised. In accordance with FCA COBS 9.2 requirements, advisors must ensure this investment aligns with clients' risk tolerance, investment objectives, and financial circumstances. The Trust is suitable for investors seeking income generation with moderate capital growth potential over a 5+ year investment horizon.

Key risks include equity market volatility, concentration risk within UK markets, dividend sustainability concerns, and interest rate sensitivity. The fund's focus on mature, dividend-paying companies may result in underperformance during growth-oriented market phases.

PERFORMANCE AND CHARGES
Over the three-year period ending March 2023, the Trust delivered an annualised total return of 6.8% (gross) versus the FTSE All-Share Index return of 5.2%. The trailing twelve-month distribution yield stands at 4.3%, with quarterly dividend payments typically made in March, June, September, and December.

The annual management charge is 0.75% plus VAT, with a total expense ratio of 0.89% as at the last annual report. Initial charges range from 0-3% depending on investment amount and client classification. No exit charges apply for holdings exceeding twelve months.

REGULATORY CONSIDERATIONS
Under FCA PROD requirements, this product has undergone comprehensive product governance review including target market identification and distribution strategy assessment. The Trust is authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority and complies with UCITS regulations. It is eligible for ISA and SIPP inclusion, making it suitable for tax-efficient portfolio construction.

Advisors should note that this investment does not provide capital protection, and past performance is not indicative of future results. All marketing materials and client communications must comply with FCA fair, clear, and not misleading standards.

TARGET MARKET
Primary target clients include UK retail investors seeking income generation, typically aged 50+ with moderate risk tolerance and investment experience. The product is particularly suitable for pre-retirement and retired investors requiring regular income streams. Minimum investment levels are £5,000 for retail clients and £50,000 for institutional mandates.

DISTRIBUTION
This factsheet is approved for use by Meridian Wealth Partners advisors (Tier 2+) for client discussions and proposal generation. All recommendations must be accompanied by appropriate suitability assessment documentation and risk warnings as required under current FCA guidance.
